# HackTrap Demonstration Guide

## Overview
This guide will walk you through demonstrating the HackTrap system's capabilities. The demo includes simulating attacks, detecting them, and viewing the results in the dashboard.

## Prerequisites
- Docker and Docker Compose installed
- Clone of the HackTrap repository
- .env file configured (copy from .env.example)

## Step 1: Start the System
```bash
docker compose up --build -d
